# Prime Citation — White-Label AEO Reports for Agencies

## Summary
Prime Citation delivers white-labeled Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) audits so agencies can make their clients citable by AI. 5 reports per month. No overhead. Your brand.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://primecitation.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://primecitation.com/privacy
- Blog: https://primecitation.com/blog

## About
Prime Citation is an AEO agency service founded by Darren Kelly under Kelly Green Holdings. We run deep technical AEO audits — schema validation, entity coverage mapping, semantic HTML5 structure, competitive benchmarking — and deliver white-label reports that agencies present as their own work.

## Contact
